name: Rolo Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, cocoa, and baking soda. Mix well.
3. In a large bowl, beat together 1 cup sugar and brown sugar with margarine until light and fluffy.
4. Add vanilla extract and eggs; beat well.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, blending thoroughly.
6. Stir in half of the chopped nuts.
7. For each cookie, shape about 2 tablespoons of dough around one Rolo, covering it completely.
8. In a small bowl, combine the remaining chopped nuts (ground fine) with 2 tablespoons of sugar.
9. Press one side of each ball into the nut mixture.
10. Place the cookies, nut side up, on ungreased cookie sheets about two inches apart.
11. Bake at 375°F for 7-10 minutes or until set and slightly cracked.
12. Cool for 2 minutes before removing from cookie sheets.
13. Allow cookies to cool completely.
